title: clutia angustifolia
intro: Clutia angustifolia is a plant species that belongs to the Clutiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clutia angustifolia include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
